title: transport: parse_incoming defined after test module
description:
In core/src/transport.rs, the parse_incoming function is defined at line 606, after the #[cfg(test)] mod tests block (lines 501-603). The standard Rust layout is to place all production code before the test module. Because parse_incoming is called from connect (line 112) and connection_manager (line 210), readers scanning the file top-to-bottom encounter call sites before the definition, and the definition appears to be an afterthought after the tests.

Fix: move parse_incoming to immediately before its first call site, or at minimum before the mod tests block.
